title: Junior Business Development Manager at WeWork India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at WeWork India
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!
